decision_summary: v6.8 should proceed as Executable Quality Ledger
rationale: v6.7 closed structural self-attestation at release sign-off. The next highest-leverage gap is keeping corrected assumptions, contradicted claims, runtime evidence, and QIF-relevant evidence changes appendable and auditable before future decisions.
recommendation: Close TASK-077 and open a bounded implementation task for the ledger foundation only.
expected_user_reaction: the next frontier is selected before implementation begins
